exercises.name: Ski Erg (1000m)
exercises.suggestion_note: SHOULDER MODIFICATION: Shortened ROM, no full overhead reach. Drive from hip hinge and lats. Conservative pace 2:10–2:20/500m. If sharp pain (>6/10), substitute Assault Bike 50 cal. Rate shoulder pain 0–10 after each rep.

exercises.name: Sled Push (50m)
exercises.suggestion_note: Drive from hips, short powerful steps, arms at chest height (neutral shoulder position). Steady and controlled.

exercises.name: Sled Pull (50m)
exercises.suggestion_note: Hand-over-hand, sit back and use bodyweight. Horizontal pulling at neutral angle — generally tolerable for rotator cuff. Controlled rhythm.

exercises.name: Wall Ball (100 reps)
exercises.suggestion_note: CRITICAL SHOULDER TEST: Start with set of 10. If pain ≤3/10, continue 15–20 reps per set with 5–10 sec rest. If 4–6/10, reduce to 8–10 reps per set with longer rest. If >6/10, STOP and substitute remaining with goblet squats. This data is ESSENTIAL for race-day planning.

exercises.name: Cable Row (1000m equivalent)
exercises.suggestion_note: Horizontal pull at low angle (safe for shoulder). Hold steady 2:00–2:10/500m split. Do not sprint the first 500m. Last session 50kg × 10–11 reps — maintain.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry (200m)
exercises.suggestion_note: Arms at sides, grip and posture fully shoulder-safe. Squeeze handles hard, shoulders back and down. Do not rush.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust (sandbag lunge alternative)
exercises.suggestion_note: Substitute for sandbag lunges (100m bear-hug): if right shoulder grip position bothersome, use barbell hip thrust 55kg × 12 reps to conserve energy and avoid overhead/grip stress. Core tight, controlled tempo.

cardio.notes: 8 × (1km run @ 5:30–6:00/km + station). Target consistent splits, NOT fast splits. HR spikes hardest at Burpee Broad Jumps (station 4). Walk 2–3 min between run+station if needed. Total session ~65–75 min at ~70% effort (ACWR ~1.0–1.1 optimal).

notes: FULL HYROX SIMULATION — KEY SESSION 7 days before race. RIGHT ROTATOR CUFF TEAR: Monitor shoulder pain 0–10 at every station. Wall Balls (station 8) is critical test — data directly informs race-day strategy. Log total elapsed time, each 1km run split, time per station, RPE per station, shoulder pain per station, avg/max HR. Substitute Ski Erg → Assault Bike 50 cal if sharp pain; Wall Balls → goblet squats if >6/10 pain. Cool down: 5 min walk, stretch hamstrings/quads/hips/calves, band external rotations 1 × 15 each arm. Eat within 60 min: 40g+ protein, 80g+ carbs.
